articles.title: More Than A Playground: Why Mumbai Is Fighting To Save The Neville D’Souza Football Ground
articles.summary: The fight over Neville D’Souza Football Ground isn’t just about football. It’s about who gets access to public space in a city where every square foot is contested. Players, coaches, and residents are pushing back against plans to replace the venue with a convention centre.
